title: olearia monticola
intro: Olearia monticola is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to New Zealand. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Olearia monticola include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support wound healing. In herbal preparations, Olearia monticola is often used as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
